text:
is a Japanese voice actress who was born in Osaka. Previously a member of Vi-Vo, Yuriko is currently freelance. She voices Ritsuko Akagi. She is most known for the roles of Nico Robin (One Piece) and the second voice of Nurse Joy (Pokémon). Her hobby is overtone singing. Her nickname is "Yuruko". Yuko Kobayashi filled in as the voice of Nico Robin and Kikuko Inoue filled in as the voice of Nurse Joy while Yamaguchi was on maternity leave.

A selection of other roles voiced by Yuriko Yamaguchi

Ah! My Goddess: The Movie as Yggdrasil

Cardcaptor Sakura: The Movie as Fudie Li

Eureka Seven as Sonia Wakabayashi

Fighting Spirit as Mama-san

Full Metal Panic as Nora Lemming

Kurogane Communication as Haruka's Mother

Naruto as Orochimaru (Woman)

Noir as Paulette

Omishi Magical Theater Risky Safety as Moe's Mother

One Piece as Nico Robin

Outlaw Star as Reiko Ando

Pokémon as Nurse Joy

and many others...
